channel.title: Long-List on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Long-List on smpaget blog

item.title: Album of the Year 2024 – The long list
item.description:
As you no doubt know, I select my album of the year every year. This is of no interest to most people but keeps me amused. To match $potify wrapped or whatever, I create a long list and attempt to whittle the list down to 3 top albums to be unveiled within the first week in January. This year is no different. I have enjoyed listening to lots of albums during 2024. In this list, you will also find something to enjoy if you venture that way. You will have heard of some people on this list, and perhaps others you will never have heard of. This year, 40+ albums were on the Long List. {country of birth – artist name – album name}. In alphabetical order. USA - Bad Bad Hats - Bad Bad Hats file under - Joyous pop musicUSA - Caroline Says - The Lucky One file under -Folk/DreampopFRA - Christophe Rousett - Louise Bertin Fausto file under - ClassicalUSA - Cindy Lee - Diamond Jubilee file under - Indie PopUSA - The Decemberists - As It Ever Was, So It Shall Be Again file under - indie popJPN - Eddie Marcon - Yahho no Potori file under - folkUSA - Father John Misty - Mahashmashana file under - PopNZL - Fazerdaze - Soft Power file under - shoegaze/DreampopUSA/BEL - Fievel Is Glauque - Rong Weicknes file under - Prog-JazzUSA - Ginger Root - SHINBANGUMI file under - Aggressive Elevator SoulUSA - Haley Heynderickx - Seed of a Seed file under - Singer/SongwriterUSA - Helado Negro - PHASOR file under - Joyous Pop musicUK - Ibibio Sound Machine - Pull the Rope file under - DanceUSA - The Innocence Mission - Midwinter Swimmers file under - Folk PopTUR - Isik Kural - Moon in Gemini file under - FolkUK - Jill Lorean - Peace Cult file under - indie rockUSA - Jimmy Montague - Tomorrows Coffee file under - Joyous Pop musicUSA - John Roseboro - Fools file under - post Bossa NovaAUS - Juanita Stein - The Weightless Hour file under - Singer/SongwriterFRA - Justice - Hyperdrama file under - DanceCAN - Kaia Kater - Strange Medicine file under - Singer/SongwriterISL - Laufey - Bewitched file under - Lounge JazzUK - Laura Marling - Patterns In Repeat file under - Singer/SongwriterUSA - Mary Timony - Untame the Tiger file under - Jingle Jangle/ Indie PopUK - Micheal Kiwanuka - Small Changes file under - Indie/SoulUSA - Mo Dotti - Opaque file under - Shoegaze/DreampopBRA - Naima Block - Below a Massive Dark Land file under - Singer/SongwriterUSA - Office Culture - Enough file under - Art popIRL - Orla Gartland - Everybody Needs a Hero file under - Indie PopUK - Our Girl - The Good Kind file under - Indie RockIND - Peter Cat Recording Co. - BETA file under - Indie RockUSA - Sarah Jarosz - Polaroid Lovers file under - Pop / FolkUK - Sassyhiya - Take You Somewhere file under -USA - Sierra Ferrell - Trail of Flowers file under - Country PopUK - Sinkane - We Belong file under - Joyous Pop musicUK - The Smile - Cutouts file under - Indie RockUK - The Smile - Wall of Eyes file under - Indie RockUSA - Sofie Royer - Young-Girl Forever file under -The Softies - The Bed I Made file under - Indie PopUSA - T Bone Burnett - The Other Side file under - Folk PopUSA - Thee Sacred Souls - Got a Story to Tell file under - Soul/GospelUSA - Tim Heidecker - Slipping Away file under - Joyous Pop musicUSA - The Umbrellas - Fairweather Friend file under - Jingle Jangle / Indie PopUSA - Vampire Weekend - Only God Was Above Us file under - Joyous Pop musicUSA - Yasmin Williams - Acadia file under - accoustic / instrumental If you wish you can play a $potify list with all the 2024 great albums on it.
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/3zEpfCajqshYwsn3Zrq1rd?si=cd644ee6ff72462d

item.title: Album of the Year 2022 - The long list
item.description:
As you no doubt know by now, every year I select my album of the year. This is of no interest to most people but keeps me amused. In the first month of the new year, I create a long list, and attempt to whittle the list down to 3 top albums. This year is no different. I have enjoyed listening to them during 2022. and I dare say you will also find something to enjoy if you venture this way. Some people on this list you will have heard of, perhaps, others you will never of heard of. This year there are 37 albums on the Long List. {country of birth - artist name - album name} UK - Naima Block - Giant Palm
USA - Jake Xerxes Fussell - Good and Green Again
USA - Beach House - Once Twice Melody
KOR - Say Sue Me - The Last Thing Left
USA - Big Thief - Dragon New Warm Mountain I Believe In You
NZL - Yumi Zouma - Present Tense
AUS - Rolling Blackouts Coastal Fever - Endless Rooms
CAN - Tallies - Patina
USA - Toro y Moi - MAHAL
UK - The Smile - A Light for Attracting Attention
USA - Craig Finn - Legacy of Rentals
BRA - Tim Bernardes - Mil Coisas Invisiveis
ESP - Alfonso de Vilallonga - Nueva en benidorm (Banda sonora original)
UK - The Ezra Collective - Where I’m Meant To Be
USA - Mamalarky - Pocket Fantasy
NZL - The Beths - Expert in a Dying Field
USA - Eli Winter - Eli Winter
USA - Julie Odell - Autumn Eve
USA - Lou Turner - Microcosmos
USA - Sam Prep/John McEntire - Sons Of
CAN -  Badge Époque Ensemble - Cloud of Joy
USA - Danger Mouse - Cheat Codes
NOR - Jenny Hval - Classic Objects
USA - Widowspeak - The Jacket
TUR - Isik Kural - in February
IRE - Pillow Queens - Leave The Light On
USA - Father John Misty  - Chloe and the Next 20th Century
AUS - Romero - Turn It On!
UK - Wet Leg - Wet Leg
USA - Tomberlin - i don’t know who needs to hear this…
USA - Flasher - Love is Yours
USA - Tenci - A Swollen River, A Well Overflowing
ECU - Mala Fama - Jichushka
AUS - Carla dal Forna - Come Around
USA - Makaya McCraven - In These Times
USA - Marisa Anderson - Still, Here
UK - Walt Disco - Unlearning If you wish, here is a link to a long list Spotify playlist. https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6jBjxPCcbeh1kX4IBAyz8W?si=9542cd93bb874116 Support the artists by buying their records as well as streaming them. I know I do. Here also is a spotify playlist of all the albums I have listened to over 2022 (that are on spotify). https://open.spotify.com/playlist/33cZA3vqPfJNLWiRj5O7pB?si=83285fcde8204a09

item.title: Looking back - The long list of Best Albums I heard in 2019
item.description:
Here is the long list of the best music album of 2019. The rules are, it must be music I have heard in 2019, but the album does not need to have been released in 2019. No guarantee beyond this of anything but I that I liked the album. Blankenberge - More (russia)
Boygenius - boygenius (US)
Brighde Chaimbel- The Reeling (Scotland)
Buddy & Julie Miller - Breakdown on 20th Ave South (US)
Cate le Bon - Reward (Wales)
Chain Wallet - No Ritual (US)
The Chemical Brothers - No Geography (England)
Courtney Marie Andrews - May Your Kindness Remain (US)
Filthy Friends - Invitation (US)
Flares on Film - Naive Songs (Italy)
Funeral Advantage - Nectarine (US)
The Honey Dewdrops - Anyone Can See (US)
Jamila Woods - Legacy! Legacy! (US)
Jennah Bell - Anchors and Elephants (US)
Joel Ansett - A place I knew before (US)
Leah Nobel - Running in borrowed shoes (US)
Leslie Stevens - Sinner (US)
Long Beard - Means to me (US)
Low Roar - ross. (Iceland)
Lucy Dacus - Historian (US)
Micheal Franti & Spearhead- Stay Human vol. II (US)
Oso Oso -Basking in the glow (US)
Over the Rhine - Love and Revelation (US)
Purple Pilgrims - Perfumed earth (NZ)
Rachel Sermanni - So It Turns (Scotland)
Rainbow Girls- Give the People what they want (US)
Siamese Youth - Electric Dreams (DE)
Tallies - Tallies (Canada)
Team Body - Dreamo (US) I have managed to put all the albums onto a Spotify playlist for you all, should you want. https://open.spotify.com/playlist/50cZvXIXF2qbR67i4t1mxH?si=AiMZS5UxQdeD-LZtVmm7Vg
